title: Abyss Odyssey
notes: Long installation time of redistributable prerequisites

title: Abyss Odyssey
notes: PATH START THIS GAMES IS NOT WORKING

After downloading the game on Steam, but before launching it, navigate to the game's redist folder (.../steamapps/common/abyss_odyssey/_CommonRedist/) and delete the DotNet and vcredist folders. Once that is done, click the play button; the game won't launch, but it will generate the game's prefix (.../steamapps/compatdata/255070/pfx/). Install xact and xna40 to this prefix via winetricks/protontricks, and the game should be able to launch properly.
title: Abyss Odyssey

notes: First time starting it downloads 8 files (directx / microsoft something something). Then it does nothing. Subsequent starts do nothing. Borked
title: Abyss Odyssey

notes:
Runs perfectly (60fps) after a little extra work.  This verifies a previous gold report.  
1: Install game
2: rm -Rf ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/abyss_odyssey/_CommonRedist/DotNet
3: rm -Rf ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/abyss_odyssey/_CommonRedist/vcredist
4: Attempt to launch game.  It won't run.  This is expected.
5: protontricks 255070 xact
6: protontricks 255070 xna40
7: run game
title: Abyss Odyssey

notes: As other comments said, you have to delete "DotNet" folder from "[YOUR_STEAM_DIR]/abyss_odyssey/_CommonRedist/", "export WINEPREFIX" environment variable to "[YOUR_STEAM_DIR]/compatdata/255070/pfx" then launch "winetricks xact xna40". I left vcredist folder and it still works. Abyss Odyssey does launch but I get 45-50 fps on a Nvidia 1070 Ti. Only played prologue.
